I really enjoy this game I think it’s pretty good for those who are like banned on the real gorilla tag they can just play this it’s pretty fun to play I love it there’s also a game called Gorilla tag V2 it’s also like this game it’s pretty good to play so 10/10 I would recommend this gorilla tag and gorilla tag v2 their both good games aside from the real gorilla tag but yeah I think all of the gorilla tags are good thanks for making this game it’s pretty helpful to those who are banned on gorilla tag v2 and gorilla tag.
